---
title: "tf-idf-rating"
author: "Mahin Roddur"
date: "2026-04-12"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

if (!requireNamespace("pacman", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("pacman")
}
library(pacman)

p_load(
  here,
  caret,
  tidyverse,
  tidymodels,
  tidytext,
  textrecipes,
  Matrix,
  wordcloud,
  tm,
  stopwords,
  RColorBrewer,
  glmnet,
  pROC,
  stringr
)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv(here("data/processed/reviews_with_sent_scores.csv")) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(summary, advice_to_management, review_pros, review_cons), ~ replace_na(., "")),
    text_all = paste(summary, review_pros, review_cons, advice_to_management, sep = " "),
    rating_group = case_when(
      rating_overall <= 2 ~ "Low",
      rating_overall == 3 ~ "Mid",
      rating_overall >= 4 ~ "High"
    )
  )

df_low_high <- df %>%
  filter(rating_group %in% c("Low", "High"))
```

```{r}
custom_stopwords <- c(
  stopwords("english"),
  "bad", "good", "great", "will", "company",
  "job", "work", "employee", "employees", "people", "here"
)
```

```{r}
plotWordCloudFromDF <- function(data, column_name) {
  text_data <- paste(data[[column_name]], collapse = " ")
  
  docs <- Corpus(VectorSource(text_data)) %>%
    tm_map(content_transformer(tolower)) %>%
    tm_map(removePunctuation) %>%
    tm_map(removeNumbers) %>%
    tm_map(removeWords, custom_stopwords) %>%
    tm_map(stripWhitespace)
  
  wordcloud(
    words = docs,
    max.words = 300,
    random.order = FALSE,
    rot.per = 0.35,
    colors = brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"),
    scale = c(3, 0.5)
  )
}

text_cols <- c("summary", "advice_to_management", "review_pros", "review_cons", "text_all")

for (col in text_cols) {
  plotWordCloudFromDF(df, col)
}
```

```{r}
clean_unigrams_by_group <- function(data, text_col, group_col = "rating_group", top_n = 15) {
  data %>%
    select(all_of(c(text_col, group_col))) %>%
    unnest_tokens(word, !!sym(text_col)) %>%
    filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
    filter(!word %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
    count(.data[[group_col]], word, sort = TRUE) %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    slice_max(n, n = top_n) %>%
    ungroup()
}

freq_unigram_by_rating <- clean_unigrams_by_group(df, "text_all")

ggplot(freq_unigram_by_rating,
       aes(x = reorder_within(word, n, rating_group), y = n, fill = rating_group)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~rating_group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Unigrams by rating_overall Group",
    x = "Term",
    y = "Frequency"
  )
```

```{r}
clean_bigrams_by_group <- function(data, text_col, group_col = "rating_group", top_n = 15) {
  data %>%
    select(all_of(c(text_col, group_col))) %>%
    unnest_tokens(bigram, !!sym(text_col), token = "ngrams", n = 2) %>%
    separate(bigram, into = c("word1", "word2"), sep = " ") %>%
    filter(str_detect(word1, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
    filter(str_detect(word2, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
    filter(!word1 %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
    filter(!word2 %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
    unite(bigram, word1, word2, sep = " ") %>%
    count(.data[[group_col]], bigram, sort = TRUE) %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    slice_max(n, n = top_n) %>%
    ungroup()
}

freq_bigram_by_rating <- clean_bigrams_by_group(df, "text_all")

ggplot(freq_bigram_by_rating,
       aes(x = reorder_within(bigram, n, rating_group), y = n, fill = rating_group)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~rating_group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Bigrams by rating_overall Group",
    x = "Bigram",
    y = "Frequency"
  )
```

```{r}
tfidf_unigram_by_rating <- df %>%
  select(rating_group, text_all) %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, text_all) %>%
  filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(!word %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
  count(rating_group, word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  bind_tf_idf(word, rating_group, n) %>%
  group_by(rating_group) %>%
  slice_max(tf_idf, n = 15) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(tfidf_unigram_by_rating,
       aes(x = reorder_within(word, tf_idf, rating_group),
           y = tf_idf,
           fill = rating_group)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~rating_group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Unigram TF-IDF Terms by rating_overall Group",
    x = "Term",
    y = "TF-IDF"
  )
```

```{r}
tfidf_bigram_by_rating <- df %>%
  select(rating_group, text_all) %>%
  unnest_tokens(bigram, text_all, token = "ngrams", n = 2) %>%
  separate(bigram, into = c("word1", "word2"), sep = " ") %>%
  filter(str_detect(word1, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(str_detect(word2, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(!word1 %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
  filter(!word2 %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
  unite(bigram, word1, word2, sep = " ") %>%
  count(rating_group, bigram, sort = TRUE) %>%
  bind_tf_idf(bigram, rating_group, n) %>%
  group_by(rating_group) %>%
  slice_max(tf_idf, n = 15) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(tfidf_bigram_by_rating,
       aes(x = reorder_within(bigram, tf_idf, rating_group),
           y = tf_idf,
           fill = rating_group)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~rating_group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Bigram TF-IDF Terms by rating_overall Group",
    x = "Bigram",
    y = "TF-IDF"
  )
```

```{r}
tfidf_unigram_by_score <- df %>%
  mutate(rating_overall = as.factor(rating_overall)) %>%
  select(rating_overall, text_all) %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, text_all) %>%
  filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(!word %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
  count(rating_overall, word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  bind_tf_idf(word, rating_overall, n) %>%
  group_by(rating_overall) %>%
  slice_max(tf_idf, n = 12) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(tfidf_unigram_by_score,
       aes(x = reorder_within(word, tf_idf, rating_overall),
           y = tf_idf,
           fill = rating_overall)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~rating_overall, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Unigram TF-IDF Terms by rating_overall",
    x = "Term",
    y = "TF-IDF"
  )
```

```{r}
tfidf_bigram_low_high <- df_low_high %>%
  select(rating_group, text_all) %>%
  unnest_tokens(bigram, text_all, token = "ngrams", n = 2) %>%
  separate(bigram, into = c("word1", "word2"), sep = " ") %>%
  filter(str_detect(word1, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(str_detect(word2, "^[a-z]+$")) %>%
  filter(!word1 %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
  filter(!word2 %in% custom_stopwords) %>%
  unite(bigram, word1, word2, sep = " ") %>%
  count(rating_group, bigram, sort = TRUE) %>%
  bind_tf_idf(bigram, rating_group, n) %>%
  group_by(rating_group) %>%
  slice_max(tf_idf, n = 20) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(tfidf_bigram_low_high,
       aes(x = reorder_within(bigram, tf_idf, rating_group),
           y = tf_idf,
           fill = rating_group)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~rating_group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Bigram TF-IDF Terms: Low vs High Ratings",
    x = "Bigram",
    y = "TF-IDF"
  )
```
